_comment: Branch protection for BOOTSTRAP tier per REPO_STANDARDS.md §2. Tier repos: aidoc-flow-interlog (new repos pending CI adoption). Only `Lint / format / security hooks` is required — ai-review + composition are OPT-IN per aidoc-flow-operations/docs/REPO_ONBOARDING.md until the repo joins the CI-consumer set. Once a bootstrap repo adopts ai-review, migrate it to the product-code branch-protection profile.
_apply_note: PR-C2 MUST strip ALL `_`-prefix keys before POST/PUT/PATCH. Use `jq 'del(.._comment, .._apply_note, .._docs, .._endpoint, .._umbrella_note)'` or equivalent. GitHub REST endpoints strictly validate unknown fields.
